hooks.prompt: Subagent session ending. If you were working on a Nexora work item, add a checkpoint comment with nexora_comment_add summarizing what was accomplished in this subagent session.

Context is about to be compressed. If you are working on a Nexora work item, save your current progress as a comment using nexora_comment_add with a summary of: what you've done so far, what's remaining, any decisions made. This preserves context across the compression boundary.
